name: Mock Chopped Liver (Childs)
recipeIngredient: boiled or steamed until cooked, but not mushy
sauteed in oil until very soft and turning brown
1/4 cup Unsweetened peanut butter (optional, like Laura Scudders)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lentils until soft, then drain.
2. Boil or steam the green beans until cooked but not mushy.
3. Sauté the onions in oil until very soft and turning brown; add garlic cloves.
4. Toast the peanuts and walnuts separately.
5. Mix all ingredients with peanut butter (if using) into a food processor.
6. Blend everything together until smooth.
7. Serve as a sandwich spread or on crackers.
This recipe makes a lot of spread, which freezes well. After thawing, stir thoroughly and ensure the lentils and green beans are well drained before serving with crackers or making sandwiches.
